description_long: This flower shop is a two-story commercial building with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a flat roof and a combination of white, gray, and dark green exterior walls. The front facade includes a large display window, a recessed entrance, and decorative stonework along the lower portion. Small planters with greenery are integrated into the exterior, and the upper level has a balcony or terrace area with visible furniture. The shop's signage is simple and understated, blending with the overall aesthetic. The building sits on a black rectangular base, suggesting a sidewalk or urban lot.
description: A modern, two-story flower shop with a flat roof, large display window, and integrated planters, finished in white, gray, and dark green.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain white wall with minimal features and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: The front-left view highlights the main entrance, large display window, stonework, and integrated planters, as well as the upper terrace with furniture.
description_view_2: The right-side view reveals a secondary entrance, a dark green accent wall, and the upper terrace area.
description_view_3: The left-side view displays a mostly solid gray wall with small decorative square insets and a partial view of the terrace railing.
